name.description: Campaign display name. A campaign IS a vertical: the campaign name defines the vertical.

vertical.description: Vertical code this campaign belongs to. A campaign is a vertical, so this mirrors the campaign identity.

brand.description: Brand code / name this campaign is associated with. Nullable.

send_mode.description: How sources send leads into this campaign: Ping Post, Direct Post, or Both. Not a forced either/or.

supplier_ids.description: JSON array of Supplier record ids assigned to this campaign

status.description: Campaign lifecycle status. Kept in sync with the active boolean: active derives active true, disabled derives active false.
